item.title: 2d Barcode Generator Software [Office Apps]

item.itunes:author: businessbarcode
item.itunes:summary:
2d Barcode Generator Software
(Office Apps)
www.businessbarcodes.org website to download 2d Barcode Generator Software offers smart solution for easily creating most attractive labels saved in jpeg, png, wmf, tiff and exif. Barcode label creator application prints multi-copies of same label on a single paper.

item.title: Pen drive File Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pen drive File Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ntfsfilerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Pen drive File Recovery Application
(Utilities)
Is it possible to get back deleted documents folder without facing any difficulty? Download well developed Pen drive File Recovery Software that easily retrieve user valuable office documents, birthday photographs, wedding video clips, holiday picture and many more from accidentally formatted flash storage drive. Free data revival application is simple to operate and provide facility to restore lost or missing folder at user specified location on computer system. Affordable USB file rescue program support recovery of various types of files such as music, audio, video, image, text etc from corrupted pen drive.

[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:

item.title: WholeClear Thunderbird To PST Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear Thunderbird To PST Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:author: ellasmith
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear Thunderbird To PST Converter
(File Management)
Free Download WholeClear Thunderbird To PST Converter is the most famous tool to migrate Thunderbird mailbox data to PST for Outlook. This software efficiently Converts single or bulk Thunderbird to Outlook PST file format without destroying data. It provides progressive features that enable to migration of complete mailbox data with attachments from Thunderbird to PST file. It has a straightforward and effortless user interface that makes it easy to operate and understand for non-professional users. It's functioned with Outlook and Windows versions up to 11. Throughout the procedure of conversion, it keeps the actual structure of data. This software automatically selects configure Thunderbird profile for conversions. For user ease, it also offers a technical support staff to solve users' queries/problems. Key Features of Thunderbird To PST Converter - Instant convert single or bulk Thunderbird mailbox items to Outlook Automatically select Thunderbird profiles from their actual location for conversion. Provides options to create PST files- single or multiple PST files Support all Outlook and Windows versions up to 11 Show preview of complete mbox files before conversion The free trial pack is also availiable to check its working performance.
Visit Here:- https://www.wholeclear.com/thunderbird/pst/
[read more]

It provides progressive features that enable to migration of complete mailbox data with attachments from Thunderbird to PST file. It has a straightforward and effortless user interface that makes it easy to operate and understand for non-professional users. It's functioned with Outlook and Windows versions up to 11. Download retrieval software from www.driverecoverysoftware.org to recover accidentally deleted folder, file, images and videos. Highly technical recovery program provides facility to retrieve deleted file due to some common human mistake.

item.title: WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: wisp
item.itunes:summary:
WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER (WNRE) is a cutting-edge mobile optimizer developed by the talented team at @wisprjct. Unlike traditional optimization tools, WNRE is specifically designed for non-rooted Android devices, offering a seamless and efficient performance boost without requiring root access. With this innovative application, users can experience enhanced device speed, improved battery life, and optimized resource management, all without compromising the integrity of their device's operating system. Whether it's clearing cache, managing background apps, or fine-tuning system settings, WNRE empowers non-rooted users to unlock the full potential of their devices and enjoy a smoother, faster, and more responsive mobile experience. Say goodbye to sluggishness and hello to peak performance with WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER.

[read more]

With this innovative application, users can experience enhanced device speed, improved battery life, and optimized resource management, all without compromising the integrity of their device's operating system. Say goodbye to sluggishness and hello to peak performance with WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER.

[read more]

WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER (WNRE) is a cutting-edge mobile optimizer developed by the talented team at @wisprjct. Unlike traditional optimization tools, WNRE is specifically designed for non-rooted Android devices, offering a seamless and efficient performance boost without requiring root access. With this innovative application, users can experience enhanced device speed, improved battery life, and optimized resource management, all without compromising the integrity of their device's operating system. Whether it's clearing cache, managing background apps, or fine-tuning system settings, WNRE empowers non-rooted users to unlock the full potential of their devices and enjoy a smoother, faster, and more responsive mobile experience. Say goodbye to sluggishness and hello to peak performance with WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER.

[read more]

item.title: p7zip-gui [File Management]
item.itunes:title: p7zip-gui [File Management]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
p7zip-gui
(File Management)
p7zip is a linux port of the Windows programs 7z.exe and 7za.exe provided by 7-zip.
7-zip is a file archiver with the highest compression ratio. Homepage : www.7-zip.org

7z uses plugins (7z.so and Codecs/Rar29.so) to handle archives. 7za is a stand-alone executable. 7za handles less archive formats than 7z.exe. 7zr is a light stand-alone executable that supports only 7z/LZMA/BCJ/BCJ2.

Some GUI : 7zG : alpha stage 7zFM : alpha stage

Also add some context menus for KDE4 and KDE5(deb package only).

[read more]
item.description:
p7zip-gui
(File Management)
p7zip is a linux port of the Windows programs 7z.exe and 7za.exe provided by 7-zip.
7-zip is a file archiver with the highest compression ratio. Homepage : www.7-zip.org

7z uses plugins (7z.so and Codecs/Rar29.so) to handle archives. 7za is a stand-alone executable. 7za handles less archive formats than 7z.exe. 7zr is a light stand-alone executable that supports only 7z/LZMA/BCJ/BCJ2.

Some GUI : 7zG : alpha stage 7zFM : alpha stage

Also add some context menus for KDE4 and KDE5(deb package only).

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
p7zip-gui
(File Management)
p7zip is a linux port of the Windows programs 7z.exe and 7za.exe provided by 7-zip.
7-zip is a file archiver with the highest compression ratio. Homepage : www.7-zip.org

7z uses plugins (7z.so and Codecs/Rar29.so) to handle archives. 7za is a stand-alone executable. 7za handles less archive formats than 7z.exe. 7zr is a light stand-alone executable that supports only 7z/LZMA/BCJ/BCJ2.

Some GUI : 7zG : alpha stage 7zFM : alpha stage

Also add some context menus for KDE4 and KDE5(deb package only).

[read more]

item.title: WholeClear OST To PST Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear OST To PST Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:author: ellasmith
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear OST To PST Converter
(File Management)
WholeClear OST To PST Converter export the complete data from Outlook OST files to PST format without Exchange server and Outlook. It has ability to convert single or bulk OST files into PST at once without creating any problem. This software has simple and easy user interface that why it's too easy to use for any kinds of users weather they are technical or non technical. The tool has various numbers of advanced feature that makes it effortless to use and understandable. Our software has ability to migrate damage corrupted OST files to PST. It allows users to export all emails, contacts, calendars, notes, journals, etc. into PST files formats. It support the all outlook versions like- 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, 2010, 2007, 2003, etc. Even, it's works with all editions of windows up to 11. For the satisfaction of users we are providing the free demo pack to all users which they convert initial 25 items free from OST to PST file format.
[read more]
